query:
SELECT ai.item_id, ai.item_type, ai.quantity, ai.agent_id, 
  (SELECT name FROM game_item_catalog WHERE item_id = ai.item_id LIMIT 1) as catalog_name,
  (SELECT name FROM game_equipment_catalog WHERE equipment_id = ai.item_id LIMIT 1) as equip_name
FROM agent_inventory ai
WHERE ai.item_id NOT IN (SELECT item_id FROM game_item_catalog) 
  AND ai.item_id NOT IN (SELECT equipment_id FROM game_equipment_catalog)
ORDER BY ai.item_id
